overall.description: Stationary first-person view in a cyberpunk game environment, focusing on a large animated holographic billboard in a narrow industrial alleyway at night. The scene features vibrant neon pink and purple lighting against dark metal architecture with no pedestrian or vehicle activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial alleyway with holographic advertisement

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the animated holographic billboard in the alleyway

entered.detail: Large vertical pink holographic advertisement displaying 'WIDE OPEN' and 'TOMORROW' text with animated green snake graphic
Gray metal industrial building facade with pipes and mechanical equipment
Yellow and green metal industrial structure with railings and panels

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a narrow futuristic alleyway dominated by a large glowing holographic billboard displaying animated neon graphics. The industrial metal architecture of the surrounding buildings frames the vibrant pink advertisement, while the scene remains completely static with no movement or activity other than the billboard's internal animation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary first-person perspective within a dark industrial alleyway dominated by the rhythmic glow of a cyberpunk advertisement. It begins with a focused view of the narrow corridor, where the cold metal architecture of the surrounding buildings frames a massive holographic billboard. As the internal graphics of the display animate, vibrant neon pink and purple light pulses against the dark surfaces of the alley. The scene remains locked in this static composition, emphasizing the contrast between the lifeless industrial environment and the vivid, shifting energy of the holographic projection.
